log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster
→ Bite: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 15] HIT! 11 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 56/67
→ Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 39/67
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 15] HIT! 15 damage. Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster HP: 24/67
--- Gem Dragonborn — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 24/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:20+4=24 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
